allow: Bash(python -c "from core.config import settings; print\('endpoint:', settings.R2_ENDPOINT_URL if hasattr\(settings,'R2_ENDPOINT_URL'\) else 'MISSING'\); print\('bucket:', getattr\(settings,'R2_BUCKET_NAME','MISSING'\)\); print\('key_id_set:', bool\(getattr\(settings,'R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID',None\)\)\); print\('secret_set:', bool\(getattr\(settings,'R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY',None\)\)\)")

Bash(python -c "from core.config import settings; [print\(k,'=',\('SET' if v else 'EMPTY'\) if 'KEY' in k or 'SECRET' in k or 'TOKEN' in k else v\) for k,v in settings.model_dump\(\).items\(\) if 'R2' in k.upper\(\) or 'CLOUD' in k.upper\(\) or 'S3' in k.upper\(\) or 'BUCKET' in k.upper\(\) or 'ENDPOINT' in k.upper\(\)]")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import inspect; from pipeline.transform import TransformResult; print\(inspect.signature\(TransformResult.__init__\)\)")
